title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability · Broken-Build Bay
summary: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a risk-based lint policy and fixtures and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Lint Upgrades evidence cycle for this debug task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Lint Upgrades assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

content.text: Use a changed debug case for gates lint correctness that tests this competency: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Lint Upgrades has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair
steps.instruction: Append a gates-lint-upgrades-o5kgca: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Lint Upgrades into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
gates-lint-upgrades-o5kgca:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Lint Upgrades structural check is only one gate. a risk-based lint policy and fixtures must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Lint Upgrades through the concrete a risk-based lint policy and fixtures case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.
